summary: CRITICAL: actions/checkout@v4 is NOT pinned to SHA; workflow structure tests miss this security check entirely (req: pinned refs, least-privilege). Missing explanatory comments on approach (req #4). Hardcoded file list in run-tests.ps1 (filesToCopy) will break on project growth. Core module logic is sound (good error handling, single responsibilities, mocks), but unpinned action + absent comments + brittle test setup make this unshippable per requirements.
